violations.claim: VIOLATION: relative(projectRoot, f) is logged as the file's project path,
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 186
; VIOLATION: relative(projectRoot, f) is logged as the file's project path,
; but produces "../" segments when f lies outside the projectRoot subtree
(declare-const project_root_depth Int)   ; number of segments in projectRoot
(declare-const shared_prefix_depth Int)  ; depth of deepest common ancestor of projectRoot and f
; Code transition: relative() computes (project_root_depth - shared_prefix_depth) ".." steps
(assert (> project_root_depth 0))
; Code transition: DiffAnalyzer may return files from symlinked or worktree paths outside projectRoot
(assert (< shared_prefix_depth project_root_depth))
; Code transition: each step above the shared prefix contributes one ".." segment
(declare-const dotdot_count Int)
(assert (= dotdot_count (- project_root_depth shared_prefix_depth)))
; Violation: dotdot_count > 0 means the logged path starts with "../"
(assert (> dotdot_count 0))
(check-sat)
